floor_history.headline: Recon: vT40 floor=4 reproduces on main (canonical C, 178/179); the handoff's active lever (rich-pass permuter workspace + triage + all session-10 tooling) was LOST with the bb2-work-marion worktree an

frontier.hypothesis: The unknown original source shape (the only open route to both residuals) is findable by a rebuilt rich-pass permuter campaign on the vT40 base
frontier.mechanism: the sampler explores statement-geometry space directly; it previously found the masked-3 own_fallthrough=0 signpost in <1h; both residuals are closed to hand analysis (140-ordering sweep, 9-topology sweep, wrap toolbox, cc1psx parity all negative) but NOT to sampling
frontier.next_probe: rebuild the campaign in tmp/grind/marionation_Exec/s2/: preprocess vT40 body to base.c, assemble single-function offset-0 target.o from asm/funcs/marionation_Exec.s + prelude.inc (drop .set gp=64), permuter_annotate rich PERM_* pass, run with --stop-on-zero + a watcher triaging sub-200 finds; vet every find for true semantics (no uninitialized reads, no cross-symbol derivation) before integrating

frontier.hypothesis: Pair-swap @56/57 can close via a semantically-TRUE second reference to arg5 that lifts arg5val's weighted refs to 6 (density 8.0) without adding insns or notes in the do_timeout window
frontier.mechanism: local-alloc.c qty_compare tie (5.33 v 5.33) breaks on qty birth order; a genuine extra arg5 ref changes pri to 8.0 and wins the seat; identity ops tree-fold, so the ref must be a real use (e.g. value threading into an existing live variable) — untried spellings only, the sweep-closed families are banked
frontier.next_probe: enumerate true-semantics double-use spellings of arg5 (thread through an existing live local consumed by debug_printf or the return path), sweep via tools/sweep_variants.py in one call, cross-check no new pseudos/notes enter the do_timeout window (birthing_insn_p launch is the known killer)

frontier.hypothesis: Region-3 steal dies only in a source shape where check2-beqz's delay-window has a different nearest-insn than `move a1,s4` — no hand-derivable form remains, so this rides on frontier item 1's sampler
frontier.mechanism: reorg.c eager fall-through fill picks the nearest eligible insn; check1 escapes because its move is eaten by beqz-s4's slot first; every label/liveness route is byte-proven closed (all-live knob is diagnostic-only; manufactured jumpers cost a visible insn)
frontier.next_probe: no independent probe — triage sampler finds specifically for region-3 alignment (adiff the tail region of any sub-200 find against target before scoring the rest)

judge_constraints: FINAL owner ruling 2026-07-06 (do-while-zero-exception.md): do-while(0) sanctioned for ANY codegen effect incl. RA weighting, mandatory inline FAKE annotation; nested wraps additionally need a single-level-insufficient justification. The interim not-sanctioned ruling is superseded. STILL FORBIDDEN: regfix, register pins, __asm__ injection, semantic-lie C (cross-symbol derivation, per 2026-07-05).

candidate.c = vT40 (masked 4, verified): layer-1 review round-3 verdict was PASS-except-one — the NESTED wrap at line ~111 was held NEEDS_USER at the time; under the FINAL ruling it needs a documented single-level-insufficient justification (vT44 battery was staged to eliminate it entirely — check evidence). The Judge must independently verify that justification or its elimination.

Residual gap is 2 root-caused items (see evidence: pair-swap @56/57 coupled fixed point — sched2 LUID tie + qty_compare 5.33v5.33 tie; wrap toolbox measured DEAD for this pair). Do NOT re-derive the 140-ordering sweep, the 9-variant topology sweep, or the cc1psx parity test — all closed negative. Active lever at handoff: rich-pass permuter on the vT40 base.
